Hey love,

I’m finishing up the CEQA/NEPA intake form at the kitchen table and wanted to give you a heads-up that I might be a little fried tomorrow. Hernandez, AICP**, since she’s the Community Development Department’s designated lead for the Riverbend Mixed-Use Village.

At this stage we’re not proposing any off-site mitigation or specific traffic-calming measures; the idea is to address any issues later during design and permitting if the agencies push for it. You know how that makes me uneasy, especially with the school traffic.

Speaking of, can you grab Sofia tomorrow? The project site is near the intersection of Jackson Road (State Route 16) and Riverbend Parkway, the same cross streets where her school bus drops her at the Riverbend Community Center at 3:15. I’ll already be over there with Lucas after his speech therapy at the Riverbend Children’s Clinic, but I might get stuck on a call.

Heading to bed soon—thanks for holding down the fort tonight.

-D

Can you send a short email today confirming which mgd range (0.30–0.55) you want cited in the project description and utilities chapter so I can finalize the admin draft?

Thanks,
Daniel
